title: Week of April 13, 2026
summary: This week focused on platform improvements that make OpsPal more reliable and organized. We fixed licensing issues that could cause disruptions and improved our Skills library organization to help you find and use automation templates more easily.

entries.headline: Fixed licensing errors that could interrupt your work
details: Resolved issues where license validation could get stuck in loops
Added clear warnings when your license is approaching expiration

entries.headline: Better organized Skills library makes automation templates easier to find
details: Cleaned up and reorganized 98 automation templates
Fixed naming inconsistencies that made some skills hard to locate
Removed outdated templates that were no longer useful
